'''βàödh-r-s-s''' ('''kadharsesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:venmo|venmo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-r-s-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:venmo|venmo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàödh-r-s-s
|-
! Lemma
| kadharsesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidharsesoko|thidharsesoko]] || [[word:jidharsesoko|jidharsesoko]] || [[word:shidharsesoko|shidharsesoko]] || [[word:kidharsesoko|kidharsesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudharsesoko|thuthudharsesoko]] || [[word:jujudharsesoko|jujudharsesoko]] || [[word:shushudharsesoko|shushudharsesoko]] || [[word:kukudharsesoko|kukudharsesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudharsesoko|thudharsesoko]] || [[word:judharsesoko|judharsesoko]] || [[word:shudharsesoko|shudharsesoko]] || [[word:kudharsesoko|kudharsesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudharsesoko|thudharsesoko]] || [[word:judharsesoko|judharsesoko]] || [[word:shudharsesoko|shudharsesoko]] || [[word:kudharsesoko|kudharsesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedharsesoko|thedharsesoko]] || [[word:jedharsesoko|jedharsesoko]] || [[word:shedharsesoko|shedharsesoko]] || [[word:kedharsesoko|kedharsesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodharsesoko|thothodharsesoko]] || [[word:jojodharsesoko|jojodharsesoko]] || [[word:shoshodharsesoko|shoshodharsesoko]] || [[word:kokodharsesoko|kokodharsesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodharsesoko|thodharsesoko]] || [[word:jodharsesoko|jodharsesoko]] || [[word:shodharsesoko|shodharsesoko]] || [[word:kodharsesoko|kodharsesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodharsesoko|thodharsesoko]] || [[word:jodharsesoko|jodharsesoko]] || [[word:shodharsesoko|shodharsesoko]] || [[word:kodharsesoko|kodharsesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠdharsesoko|thΟΠdharsesoko]] || [[word:jΟΠdharsesoko|jΟΠdharsesoko]] || [[word:shΟΠdharsesoko|shΟΠdharsesoko]] || [[word:kΟΠdharsesoko|kΟΠdharsesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadharsesoko|thathadharsesoko]] || [[word:jajadharsesoko|jajadharsesoko]] || [[word:shashadharsesoko|shashadharsesoko]] || [[word:kakadharsesoko|kakadharsesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadharsesoko|thadharsesoko]] || [[word:jadharsesoko|jadharsesoko]] || [[word:shadharsesoko|shadharsesoko]] || [[word:kadharsesoko|kadharsesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadharsesoko|thadharsesoko]] || [[word:jadharsesoko|jadharsesoko]] || [[word:shadharsesoko|shadharsesoko]] || [[word:kadharsesoko|kadharsesoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
